title: Adjust Column Width per User
excerpt:
Changes to the default width for a column should be PER USER, NOT GLOBALLY SHARED.

posts.author: cimpicciche (Chris Impicciche)
posts.cookedHtml:
Changes to the default width for a column should be PER USER, NOT GLOBALLY SHARED.

Every time I load my board, the size of the Task Name column changes. I can only assume this is the case because any change to the size of the column affects all users of a board view. This is super irritating, because when I size the column so that it fits comfortably on my tasks (which tend to have small names on my small laptop screen) it is equally obnoxious for my colleague with long task names and a widescreen monitor.

posts.author: jpulley (Janice Pulley)
posts.cookedHtml: As we increase the use of monday.com across our organization, we (me) are running into this issue more and more. If the column width is changed in a specific view, it translates to the Main Table. I can’t be the only one that’s being driven bonkers because of this.
